[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 10000110 3
3 00101111 5
4 01001001 3
5 10111000 4
6 01101000 3
7 11100011 5

01 10 00000110 2
12 21 00001001 2
23 32 00001000 1
34 43 00101000 2
45 54 01100000 2
56 65 10000011 3
67 76 10000001 2
70 07 10000000 1

02 20 00000000 a match 0 1
13 31 00101000 2
24 42 01001000 2
35 53 10100000 2
46 64 00000000 a match 0 1
57 75 10000001 2
60 06 10000010 2
71 17 00000001 1

03 30 10000000 1
14 41 00101000 2
25 52 01000001 2
36 63 10000000 1
47 74 00000000 a match 0 1
50 05 10000010 2
61 16 00000011 2
72 27 00000001 1

04 40 00000000 a match 0 1
15 51 00100011 3
26 62 00000001 1
37 73 10000000 1
